message:
feat(tui): macro recording tests, path redaction, and shortcuts constant (2noh9.4.2)

Add 15 macro recording/playback tests including path redaction in paste
events, recording toggle lifecycle, playback event injection, and
status line indicators. Add MACRO_TOGGLE shortcut constant for Alt+M.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -528,9 +528,9 @@
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","title":"Task: CI failure artifacts for TUI tests (trace bundles, last-frames, event streams, logs)","description":"## Goal
When any TUI-related test fails, we should have a "forensic bundle" to debug quickly.

## Deliverables
- Standard artifact directory under `test-results/` for:
  - render trace
  - event macro / event stream
  - last N frame snapshots (text + ANSI)
  - cass.log excerpt
  - environment/capabilities snapshot
- Ensure artifacts are uploaded by CI job (where workflows allow).

## Acceptance Criteria
- A failure in PTY e2e test produces a bundle without additional manual steps.
- Bundles are bounded in size (cap frames and log length).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424442145Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T21:20:31.424415746Z","close_reason":"Implemented CI failure artifacts for TUI tests: TuiFailureDump utility in tests/util/mod.rs with frame snapshot capture (text + ANSI), render timing JSONL, event stream, system info, bounded artifact sizes (max 10 frames, 64KB logs). Auto-captures on ftui snapshot assertion failures. Constants TUI_DUMP_MAX_FRAMES and TUI_DUMP_MAX_LOG_BYTES. Integrates with existing trace bundle format from 2noh9.4.3. Also fixed compilation issues from concurrent agent work (consent dialog borrow error, clippy lints).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","debug","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:44:41.298861163Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:09.370414459Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","title":"Epic: Remove Ratatui + finalize migration (deps cleanup, docs/screenshots, release readiness)","description":"## Goal
Finish the migration:
- Ratatui fully removed from code and dependencies.
- Documentation updated to reflect ftui capabilities and new flags.
- Visual polish pass and release readiness checks.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:22.261738552Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:22.261738552Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","ftui","migration","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:22.261738552Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","title":"Task: Remove Ratatui from cass (Cargo.toml, src/ui, tests) and verify no references remain","description":"## Goal
Make Ratatui a zero-dependency for cass.

## Deliverables
- Remove `ratatui` dependency from `Cargo.toml`.
- Replace all Ratatui types/usages in:
  - `src/ui/*`
  - `tests/*` (ui-related)
- Ensure `rg -n "ratatui"` finds no remaining references (except maybe historical docs if intentionally kept).

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo check --all-targets` passes.
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes.
- `cargo test` passes.","notes":"Ratatui fully removed: not in Cargo.toml, not in Cargo.lock, no code references remain. Only doc comments about removal persist. cargo check/clippy --all-targets pass clean.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:37.401864211Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T11:46:05.659766968Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T11:46:05.659667373Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","migration","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.630070804Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.672268624Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.979509776Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.302278052Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.704848885Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.023478977Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:04.343587005Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.061247429Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:03.381951157Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:37.401864211Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","title":"Task: Update documentation for ftui TUI (README, keymap/style specs, troubleshooting, env vars)","description":"## Goal
Bring docs in sync with the new ftui-based TUI.

## Scope
- `README.md`:
  - mention ftui
  - document inline mode, recording/replay flags, debug overlays
  - ensure robot-mode warnings remain
- `docs/tui_style_spec.md` and `docs/tui_keymap_rfc.md`:
  - update to ftui terminology and finalized keymap
- `TESTING.md`:
  - document snapshot tests and PTY e2e flows
  - document artifact bundles on failure

## Acceptance Criteria
- A new contributor can run the TUI, understand keybindings, and run the full TUI test suite.","notes":"TealHeron claiming: update docs for ftui TUI","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:50.976911961Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T12:04:58.420615079Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["docs","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.282918004Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.618673278Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:06.929214672Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:39:50.976911961Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:05.955571333Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","title":"Task: Final UI polish pass (style spec compliance, a11y, motion budgets, terminal degradation)","description":"## Goal
Do the final pass that turns a working UI into a *world-class* UI.

## Checklist
- Style spec compliance:
  - consistent spacing
  - consistent role coloring
  - readable empty states
  - tasteful motion (if enabled)
- Accessibility:
  - contrast levels
  - a11y patterns
  - no-color mode
- Degraded terminals:
  - no glyph icons
  - plain borders
  - no gradients

## Acceptance Criteria
- The UI looks intentional and premium in common terminals.
- Nothing breaks in 80x24.
- No flicker.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979381932Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:41:43.979359260Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","polish","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.233622643Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.549640154Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.4.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:07.846967196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:06.697260970Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","title":"Task: Migration release readiness (quality gates, e2e suite, perf budgets, changelog)","description":"## Goal
Define and execute the final checklist that must pass before we consider the migration done.

## Gates
- `cargo fmt --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `cargo test`
- TUI e2e:
  - headless smoke
  - PTY interactive flows
  - snapshot suite
- Perf budgets (render time/diff size/search latency) within thresholds

## Acceptance Criteria
- All gates pass in CI.
- Changelog mentions ftui migration + major UX improvements.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058489439Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","release","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.750986910Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.5.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:09.058415240Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:40:20.264875839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.152616691Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:45:08.457033818Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2ozk","title":"T6.2: Model download + semantic integration fixtures","description":"## Files
- src/search/model_download.rs
- tests/semantic_integration.rs

## Work
- Replace fake model files with minimal valid ONNX/tokenizer fixtures
- Store fixtures under tests/fixtures/models/
- Update tests to validate checksum and load paths using real files

## Acceptance Criteria
- No mock model files created during tests
- Fixtures are tiny but valid for parser/loader
- Tests pass without network access","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T05:46:36.741008332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T06:40:01.567226638Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T06:40:01.567154374Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2ozk","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-32fs","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","title":"Phase 3C: Results list with VirtualizedList","description":"Replace the current pane rendering (manual iteration over hits with 2-line items, alternating stripe colors) with ftui_widgets::VirtualizedList. VirtualizedList provides O(1) rendering for arbitrarily large result sets using a Fenwick-tree-based height predictor and viewport windowing. Each result item renders as a custom widget with: (1) Agent icon/color badge (using agent accent from theme), (2) Source path (truncated with ellipsis), (3) Line number, (4) Timestamp (relative: 2h ago, yesterday, etc), (5) Preview snippet (up to 3 lines with match highlighting), (6) Multi-open queue indicator (checkmark when queued). Register hit regions per item for click selection. Support keyboard navigation (j/k/Up/Down) through the VirtualizedListState. The virtualization means we can display 100,000+ results without lag -- currently the TUI rebuilds all pane widgets on every frame even if only a few are visible.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:18:26.544264400Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400259784Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T07:56:39.400237052Z","close_reason":"Merged into 2noh9.3.4 (Results list). VirtualizedList, Fenwick-tree height predictor, O(1) viewport windowing details merged.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1cyg3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:56.536119790Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2qwa0","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-1p0wb","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:25:53.887793748Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2r76","title":"Define coverage targets + phased threshold increases","description":"Set explicit coverage targets (line/function) and a phased plan to reach them.\n\nDetails:\n- Start with current baseline (58.33% line).\n- Define interim gates (70%, 80%, 90%).\n- Document justified exclusions and enforce via CI.","acceptance_criteria":"1) Threshold policy defines baseline + phased targets with dates.
2) Exclusions are listed with module-level rationale.
3) CI uses the current phase threshold.
4) Documented in TESTING.md/README.","notes":"Notes:
- Align phase dates with expected test work completion.
- Keep exclusions minimal and time-boxed.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T18:16:21.917742534Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T21:11:23.986509406Z","closed_at":"2026-01-27T21:11:23.986364005Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2r76","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3jv0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:00:43Z","created_by":"import"}]}
